label: 穿孔板
description: 在 Geometry DSL 末尾追加 perforated_panel(...) 一行（带 frame 的圆孔阵列板）。当 prompt 提到 穿孔板 / 冲孔板 / 网孔 / 喇叭网罩 / perforated / mesh panel 时使用。
description-en: Append `perforated_panel(...)` — framed sheet with circular hole array. Use when the prompt mentions perforated/punched panel, mesh panel, or speaker grille.

inputs.name: pitch_y
inputs.label: Y 节距
inputs.description-en: Hole pitch along Y; defaults to pitch_x.

inputs.name: frame
inputs.label: 外框宽
inputs.description-en: Solid frame width around the holes.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 自定义 id；空 = 自动 perf{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加 perforated_panel 行后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the perforated panel.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游 g_part 的 shape_id 引用）
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (feed into a downstream g_part's shape_id).
